title: Shadow Optimized
description: An Optimization pack with some QoL mods to massively boost performance.
body:
# ShadowOptimized #
![ShadowOptimzed the ultimate optimization pack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a8db276e8b83f6c122da94564edaf6a9d7e4fb1_0.webp)
## Important(Desc.) ##
This modpack is an all-in-one solution for lag,bugs and other things. It contains some pvp texture packs and Performance-QoL mods. If you are lagging and have a low-end device. This is the perfect choice for you. Try and see yourself..... **Recommended to have 2.5GB to 4GB allocated RAM.** (Tested on 5GB)


### **If you need this pack in zip use** [mrpack to ZIP converter](https://mrpacktozip.com/) . ###

## Details(Desc.): ##
Shadow Optimized is the best optimization modpack to optimize and boost your Minecraft experience with better performance and amazing visuals. Improve FPS, reduce lag, enjoy smooth gameplay with this lightweight and powerful modpack. Perfect for all Minecraft players.

### ⚠️ Attention Content Creators ###
If you're a content creator making a video about the Shadow Optimized, please make sure to:

- Provide the Official Link: Share the official Modrinth link in your video description.
- Give Proper Credits: Mention the modpack name and give credits in your video to support its creator.

### Key Features: ###

**Performance Boost:** Powered by Sodium, Lithium, and DashLoader, this modpack drastically improves frame rates, reduces lag, and optimizes chunk loading for a buttery-smooth experience.

**Visual Enhancements:** With Iris Shaders, enjoy breathtaking lighting effects, realistic shadows, and enhanced textures for a visually captivating world.

**Improved Efficiency:** Mods like Entity Culling etc, ensure your system runs efficiently by minimizing unnecessary rendering and resource usage.

**Stability & Fixes:** Say goodbye to memory leaks and lag spikes with Memory Leak Fix and ModernFix, ensuring a stable and crash-free gameplay experience.

**User-Friendly Configuration:** Easily tweak your settings with the intuitive Cloth Config API. 

**Additional Enhancements:** Enjoy faster chunk management with Concurrent Chunk Management Engine, better mob rendering with Enhanced Block Entities, and smoother animations with 3D Skin Layers.

### Included Dependencies: ###
The modpack comes preloaded with carefully selected mods to deliver peak performance and visual excellence:

- Sodium Extra and Reese's Sodium Options for advanced performance settings.
- Lithium to optimize server and client networking.
- FerriteCore and MemoryLeakFix for reduced memory usage.
- DashLoader for quick loading.
- Chunky and C2M for chunk related optimizations.
- Model Gap Fix for enhanced block model rendering.
- EntityCulling for entity optimizations.
- VeryManyPlayers for Multiplayer optimizations.
